title: Kemal Özkırşehirli
description: Academic homepage for Kemal Özkırşehirli: AI/ML for science, computational chemistry, protein design, biomolecular simulation, CADD, statistical mechanics, and scientific workflow engineering.

author.name: Kemal Özkırşehirli
author.role: MIT B.Sc. candidate · Computer Science and Engineering · Chemical Physics · Mathematics
author.bio: I build AI/ML, generative/diffusion-model, molecular simulation, free-energy, and inference systems that turn scientific complexity into computable representations for decision-making in drug discovery, protein design, chromatin biology, theoretical chemistry, and statistical mechanics.
highlights: MIT B.Sc. candidate, expected May 2027; GPA 5.0/5.0; majors in Computer Science and Engineering, Chemical Physics, and Mathematics; minors in Philosophy and Writing.

Current work spans protein foundation model red-teaming, ChromoGen-style 3D chromatin diffusion, autoimmune target discovery, TBXT CADD, ChemAgent-QSM, EVEdesign protein design, antibody RL, and ML-augmented renormalization group theory.

Selected from 800+ applicants for PRISM 2026; selected as one of 22 worldwide Kupcinet-Getz Scholars; current and recent work across MIT, A*STAR, Columbia, Harvard Medical School, Weizmann, and Pedal AI.

Medalist in the International Chemistry Olympiad and International Mendeleev Chemistry Olympiad; TÜBİTAK National Chemistry Olympiad silver medalist; World Science Scholar; Waterloo distinction recipient.

items.title: PRISM
items.description: adversarial evaluation, reliability checks, uncertainty calibration, and failure taxonomies for protein foundation models

items.title: EVEdesign
items.description: 21-person, 18-institution, 8-country open protein-design collaboration; uncertainty-aware multi-objective candidate selection

items.title: Antibody RL
items.description: structure-informed cross-attention transformer and PPO pipeline using OAS, SAbDab, IEDB, AF-Multimer/IGFold metrics

items.title: TBXT
items.description: 11-person chordoma/TBXT sprint; 2,274 compounds + 737 analogs + 30,000 BRICS recombinations to a 570-compound novelty-filtered pool

items.title: V2M
items.description: autoimmune genetics-to-mechanism target-discovery engine with single-cell foundation models, QTL/colocalization, and targetability checks

items.title: Pedal AI
items.description: LangGraph/FastAPI chemistry agents, retrosynthesis route trees, <50ms latency, 15,000+ daily API requests, 100,000+ predictions

items.title: ChromoGen V2
items.description: conditional diffusion for small-molecule-perturbed single-cell 3D chromatin ensembles with Plate-C/Easy Dip-C/CHARM-style data

items.title: Biochemical Diffusion
items.description: PINN/neural-ODE stochastic simulation of nonequilibrium reaction-diffusion networks; Euler-Maruyama, Runge-Kutta, Gillespie SSA

items.title: Sequence-to-State
items.description: variant-effect scoring, Perturb-seq validation, counterfactual immune-state transport, and structure-aware target prioritization

items.title: ChemAgent-QSM
items.description: LLM-guided quantum/statistical-mechanics pipelines using PySCF; TCFs, local order, relaxation, mobility, spectra

items.title: Renormalization Group
items.description: GNN/PyTorch Kadanoff RG framework for spin systems, fixed points, and phase boundaries

items.title: DFT → kMC
items.description: multi-scale computational organic chemistry pipeline; 20+ transition states, 500+ trajectories, 22% predicted yield optimization
